scripts.clean: find dist -type f -delete 2>/dev/null || true && find dist -type d -empty -delete 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build: pnpm run sync-proto && pnpm run clean && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.lint: cd ../js && biome check src/core.ts src/cache-diagnostics.ts src/client.ts src/config.ts src/content_capture.ts src/context.ts src/exporters/default.ts src/exporters/grpc.ts src/exporters/http.ts src/hooks.ts src/redaction.ts src/types.ts src/utils.ts
